blocks.text: Liverpool shocked in Istanbul — Bodø/Glimt write history tomorrow

Bayern's 6-1 obliteration of Atalanta and Atlético's 5-2 demolition make Tuesday's round one of the great CL nights. Wednesday raises the stakes — four more first legs, including the biggest match in Norwegian club football history.
